resources.string: Don\'t remind me of new versions
The URL parser could not find a YouTube ID in that URL. Please enter a YouTube URL
The video is private, age-restricted, or does not exist
The app failed to add metadata and save the file
Please enter a valid YouTube URL
The device disconnected from the internet
Please read and accept to continue

By using this application, you acknowledge and agree to the following terms:

 1. PERMITTED USE
 This application is intended for personal, non-commercial use only. You may use this application to download content solely for private purposes within your household.

 2. COPYRIGHT AND INTELLECTUAL PROPERTY
 You are solely responsible for ensuring that any content you download complies with applicable copyright laws and the terms of service of the respective content platforms. Commercial use, redistribution, or monetization of downloaded content is strictly prohibited unless you have obtained explicit permission from the copyright holder or content creator.

 3. LIMITATION OF LIABILITY
 The developer of this application assumes no responsibility or liability for:
 • Any misuse of downloaded content
 • Copyright infringement or other legal violations resulting from your use of this application
 • Any damages, claims, or legal actions arising from the commercial use or monetization of downloaded content
 • Compliance with applicable laws in your jurisdiction

 4. USER RESPONSIBILITY
 You acknowledge that you are solely responsible for your use of this application and any content you download. It is your obligation to respect intellectual property rights and comply with all applicable laws.

 5. NO WARRANTY
 This application is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, either express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability or fitness for a particular purpose.

 By clicking "Accept", you confirm that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these terms and conditions.
